what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that associates attachment id att-dc9e139f with board item item-daaa1701 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file consists only of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-daaa1701.
It records an added timestamp in ISO 8601 format.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme.
The file is purely metadata with no attached payload.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References an external board item via a custom URI scheme.
Stored as a markdown file despite having no prose content.
concerns: No payload or content is attached beyond the metadata link.
The board:// target is opaque and not resolvable from this file alone.
No author or provenance information is recorded.
notes: A minimal metadata stub linking a channel attachment to a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or artifact does attachment att-dc9e139f actually represent?
What is the nature or title of board item item-daaa1701?
What operations are valid for attachment_type 'board_items'?
Is the board:// URI resolvable elsewhere in the system?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an attachment record matches the file: it records a typed, timestamped link to a board item.
apparent_themes: Traceability of artifacts to board items.
intention_signals: It appears designed to create a durable, referenceable association between a channel artifact and a board item for later lookup or fusion.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme in the target field and the absence of any attached content make this a very minimal, link-only attachment record.
contribution: It contributes a timestamped, typed association between attachment id att-dc9e139f and board item item-daaa1701 within the dragnet-development channel.
summary_for_embedding: A channel attachment metadata file linking attachment att-dc9e139f to board item item-daaa1701 in the dragnet-development channel with a recorded timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a typed reference from a channel attachment to a board item for traceability and cross-referencing.
